# brand-assets

### logo-website-dark-theme
- type: svg
- usage: website main logo on dark/text-blue variant for light backgrounds
- base64:
```txt
data:image/svg+xml;base64,
```

### logo-website-light-theme-blue-text
- type: svg
- usage: website logo with gold icon and blue text for light backgrounds
- base64:
```txt
data:image/svg+xml;base64,
```

### logo-website-light-theme
- type: svg
- usage: website logo with gold icon and white text for dark backgrounds
- base64:
```txt
data:image/svg+xml;base64,
```

### logo-mobile-dark
- type: svg
- usage: mobile app icon with blue background for dark/default variant
- base64:
```txt
data:image/svg+xml;base64,
```

### logo-mobile-light
- type: svg
- usage: mobile app icon with beige background for light variant
- base64:
```txt
data:image/svg+xml;base64,
```

## source-reference
- website logo 1: uploaded SVG fileciteturn0file0
- website logo 2: uploaded SVG fileciteturn0file1
- website logo 3: uploaded SVG fileciteturn0file2
